name: VSEE HEALTH, INC.
summary: PART I Overview Through our wholly-owned subsidiary VSee Lab, we offer a comprehensive telehealth platform for U.S. hospitals and enterprises. Through VSee Lab, we offer a set of telehealth software building blocks, data connectors, and workflow templates that can be rapidly configured into the clients workflows.
